overview: SynergenX provides customized testosterone replacement therapy (TRT), hormone replacement therapy (HRT), and medically supervised weight loss therapies. Care is supervised by board-certified professionals who tailor treatment to each patient's individual hormone levels, symptoms, and goals.
highlights: Customized TRT tailored to individual hormone levels and goals
Bioidentical hormone therapy (BHRT) for women including estrogen, progesterone, and testosterone
Medically supervised GLP-1 weight loss therapy
targetAudience: Men with low testosterone, women experiencing menopause or perimenopause, and individuals seeking medically supervised weight loss therapy.
